name: Impossible Cherry-Custard Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Drain the cherry pie filling and reserve the syrup.
4. Beat all ingredients together (except cherries and reserved syrup) in a blender on high for 15 seconds until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate.
6. Spoon the cherries evenly over the top of the filling.
7. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 30-35 minutes.
8. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving with warm reserved syrup and whipped cream, if desired.
Note: The pie can be prepared ahead and refrigerated up to 12 hours. If refrigerating, increase baking time to 35-40 minutes.
